title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Adda247 Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Adda247 Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Adda247 Global Group, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Rajkot operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Adda247 Global Group:
Adda247 Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Support students with special educational needs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adda247 Global Group!
